title: lineardatetime
text: lineardatetime Uniface data type that represents a number of days, including fractions of days. lineardatetime ParamName : Direction lineardatetime VariableName Use Use in params and variables blocks to define the data type of a parameter or variable. The data type can be selected when defining fields, global variables, and component variables. Description Linear Date and Time represents a number of days. Partial days (hours, minutes, seconds) can be expressed as a fraction of a day. Related Links Data Handling in ProcScript The ProcScript language enables you to convert data from one type to another, perform arithmetic operations, extract data values, and perform string substitution. Uniface carries out implicit type conversion whenever necessary, for example, when assignments are made between non-matching data types or when comparing non-matching data types. The ProcScript language also provides a number of functions that allow you to convert from one data type to another. Date and Time Data Uniface offers a wide variety of data types for date and time values. Packing Codes for Date and Time Data Uniface data types Date, Time, and Datetime (and linear variations of these) are associated with a variety of packing codes. Was this topic helpful? Like Dislike
